lines.text: Allow me to formally introduce myself. I am Capollo Montelli, Carlotta's uncle, <color=yellow>son of the Padrino</color>, and <color=yellow>the next head of the family</color>.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Of course, just as stated in the invitation. I'm a man of my word.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Without you, the traitors wouldn't have been captured, and I freed from their hands.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: While Carlotta has expressed our family's gratitude, I feel obliged to do it in person.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But unfortunately, the traitors had little to offer, and the one behind them is still in the shadows. Unnerving, isn't it?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I'll wait for her findings then.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hmm... that does narrow down the possibilities.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Be as involved as you like, {PlayerName}. I won't think any less of you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Things aren't as bright for the Montellis as they may seem. The Order, Fisalias, and the Fractsidus... Any attempt to break the status quo puts us at risk.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The traitors we captured were a warning, but also a reminder—to survive, I must seek alliances beyond the family.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Especially with you, just as Carlotta did.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now that you mention it, let me be clear.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Carlotta is dear to me, and nothing will change that.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But she's from the lesser branch of the family. Tradition says I, the rightful heir, should manage dealings with the Black Shores, not her.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Restoring order and benefiting the family as I intended... that's what I meant in the letter by amending a slight misstep.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The leader of the Black Shores must have sent you here with a purpose. Tell me, and I will offer you support far beyond what Carlotta could provide.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The choice is yours, of course... But as the family heir, I will not see my authority undermined, even by those I consider allies.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So if you can't stand by my side, I'd prefer you stay out of the Montellis' affairs.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Otherwise... believe me, you won't want to find yourself at odds with us, no matter how strong you are.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You're welcome to remain an observer from the sidelines. But once you join the table, you play by the rules—my rules.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Your timing is most unfortunate. Our little chat just finished.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Carlotta, you stay. I have more to discuss with you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: A gun is a powerful tool, but only in the hands of the worthy.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: ...Very well. Keep your words in mind.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That family thief stealing from the vault? Why, are you suggesting I failed my duties?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Carlotta, where are you?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Does it matter? All you need to know is that it's handled, and I'm in the clear now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Heed my words. Whatever you've uncovered, put it behind you, and all will be as it was. No grudges, no consequences, only family.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now, we've had some trouble with a shipment over at Septimont. As the rightful heir, I'm giving you a new order. Take care of it, and I'll pretend none of this ever happened.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Excuse me?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Don't trouble yourself with the module. Yes, our family's ambition has led us far, but it's exacted a price paid in blood and tears. What harm is there in choosing the safer, easier path?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Why do you insist on tearing everything apart? Have you ever thought about what Padrino would say? What others will think of us? I've given you an out, all you need to do is accept it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Excuse me?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Why do you insist on tearing everything apart? Have you ever thought about what Padrino would say? What others will think of us? I've given you an out, all you need to do is accept it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I assume you've taken care of Benett's body?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We're in too deep now. Handing over the data module to the Order will cement out position as an ally of the authorities. We'll replace the Fisalias! The other Resonators in the city are irrelevant.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: And Benett... I would have taken care of him regardless.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: He knew too much. He deserved it for pursuing the Scarlet Velvet matter. Anyone who gets in my way shall meet the same fate.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We all stood together on that stormy night, each one of us losing someone dear. And we all share the desire for our family to find an easier path forward.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The best way to avoid sacrifice isn't fighting, but aligning ourselves with superior powers and knowing when to yield.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You may have left the family, and I should expect no more favors from you. But I ask this of you one last time. Please, put this Terminal in Carlotta's hands.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Nothing, save for the standard location tracking data every Terminal holds.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: In three days, I'll be negotiating on behalf of the family with the Order. I just want to make sure Carlotta doesn't interfere in the meantime. She'll be given a chance to join our side, I promise.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Think about Benett. If you take care of this, I will overlook what he stole and let it be a thing of the past. I know you care more about your late friend than you're willing to admit.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
